meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [6.1.0] - 2025-10-30

### Changed

- new attribute added: specVersion (Optional)

## [6.0.0] - 2024-05-21

### Changed

- connection update to @prefix ext-passport: <urn:samm:io.catenax.generic.digital_product_passport:5.0.0#>
- declarationOfConformityId is a string instead of a document list
- example values for doubles are now doubles and not integers
- corrected description texts with typos

### Added

- added commercial from ext-passport

## [5.0.0] - 2024-03-04

### Changed

- import of the new samm:io.catenax.generic.digital_product_passport:4.0.0
- deletion of either-or possibilities

## [4.0.0] - 2023-12-11

### Changed

- changed to SAMM
- fundamental changes in the structure
- references to the Digital Product Passport which references multiple other shared models

## [3.0.1] - 2023-01-15

### Added

n/a

### Changed

- several smaller fixes according to technical committee feedback

### Removed

n/a

## [3.0.0] - 2022-12-05

### Added

- added „componentsSupplierName“
- attribute "ComponentsPartNumber" was changed to a collection

### Changed

n/a

### Removed

## [2.0.0] - 2022-09-07

### Added

- attributes describing battery or its condition in more detail
- set namespace to io.catenax

nodes.label: BatteryPass
nodes.description: The battery pass describes information collected during the lifecycle of a battery

nodes.label: document
nodes.description: Set of documents containing the description of battery components

nodes.label: manufacturer
nodes.description: Legal entity which sells and invoices the battery

nodes.label: electrochemicalProperties
nodes.description: Electrochemical properties of an electrochemical energy storage

nodes.label: physicalDimensions
nodes.description: Geometrical properties of the battery

nodes.label: stateOfBattery
nodes.description: The condition of the battery at the end of life i.e. when entering recycling scheme

nodes.label: batteryIdentification
nodes.description: Information to identify a specific battery.

nodes.label: manufacturing
nodes.description: Information about the manufacturing process of a battery

nodes.label: datePlacedOnMarket
nodes.description: Date on which vehicle is produced i.e. when battery is put in the market or production date of the vehicle is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: cellChemistry
nodes.description: Information about the cell chemistry of a battery cell

nodes.label: composition
nodes.description: Information about the composition of a battery and the combination of materials is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: cO2FootprintTotal
nodes.description: The total carbon footprint of the battery, calculated as kg of carbon dioxide equivalent is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: temperatureRangeIdleState
nodes.description: The range of temperature the battery can withstand when not in use is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: warrantyPeriod
nodes.description: Commercial warranty period of the battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: batteryCycleLife
nodes.description: Property describing the cycle life of a battery

nodes.label: packagingInstructions
nodes.description: Instructions for safely packaging batteries is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: transportationInstructions
nodes.description: Instructions for safely transporting batteries is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: vehicleDismantlingProcedure
nodes.description: Document containing the vehicle dismantling procedure is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: batteryDismantlingProcedure
nodes.description: Document containing the battery dismantling procedure is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: safetyMeasures
nodes.description: Safety measures document(s) is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: testReportsResults
nodes.description: Results of test reports which prove that the battery fulfills this regulation and its delegated regulations is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: declarationOfConformity
nodes.description: Declaration of conformity (CE) is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: responsibleSourcing
nodes.description: Document/Certificates on organizations compliance to ethical business practices

nodes.label: name
nodes.description: Name of the manufacturer is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: contact
nodes.description: Contact details of the manufacturer

nodes.label: address
nodes.description: An postal address

nodes.label: batteryPower
nodes.description: Characteristic to describe the power (W) properties of the battery.

nodes.label: batteryVoltage
nodes.description: Voltage (V) of the battery.

nodes.label: ratedCapacity
nodes.description: The total number of ampere-hours (Ah) that can be withdrawn from a fully charged battery under specific conditions is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: capacityFade
nodes.description: The decrease over time and upon usage in the amount of charge that a battery can deliver at the rated voltage, with respect to the original rated capacity declared by the manufacturer is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: internalResistance
nodes.description: Internal resistance in a battery cell or pack is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: capacityThresholdExhaustion
nodes.description: Capacity threshold for exhaustion as percentage value is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: batteryEnergy
nodes.description: Characteristic to describe the energy (kWh) properties of the battery.

nodes.label: ratioMaximumAllowedBatteryPowerAndMaximumAllowedBatteryEnergy
nodes.preferredName: ratio maximum allowed battery power and maximum allowed battery energy
nodes.description: Ratio between maximum allowed battery power (W) and battery energy (Wh) is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: length
nodes.description: Length of the item is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: width
nodes.description: Width of the item is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: height
nodes.description: Height of the item is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: diameter
nodes.description: Diameter of the item.

nodes.label: weight
nodes.description: Weight of the item is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: stateOfHealth
nodes.description: Evidence/Certificate of the health evaluation of a battery for its use following repurposing or remanufacturing operations is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: stateOfCharge
nodes.description: The value of the state of charge of the battery at the end of life i.e. when entering recycling scheme is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: statusBattery
nodes.description: Status of the battery is describing a regulatory requirement. Value list provided by the regulators.

nodes.label: batteryType
nodes.description: Battery type as described by the contents of the battery e.g. cell chemistry is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: batteryModel
nodes.description: Battery type as described by the contents of the battery e.g. cell chemistry is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: batteryIDDMCCode
nodes.description: Digital Matrix Code (DMC) of the battery i.e. serial number allowing for unequivocal identification of a battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: dateOfManufacturing
nodes.description: Manufacturing date of the battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: cathodeActiveMaterials
nodes.description: The total amount of valuable materials contained in CAM material: Nickel, Cobalt, Lithium.

nodes.label: recyclateContentActiveMaterials
nodes.description: List of recovered Recyclate Content in Active Material Recycled is describing a regulatory requirement. The following materials have to be reported on as a minimium: Cobalt, Lithium, Nickel, Lead

nodes.label: anodeActiveMaterials
nodes.description: The total amount of valuable materials contained in Anode: graphite

nodes.label: cathodeCompositionOther
nodes.description: The composition or materials contained in the Cathode is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: anodeCompositionOther
nodes.description: The composition or materials contained in the anode is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: electrolyteComposition
nodes.description: List of materials contained in the electrolyte is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: components
nodes.description: Properties of the battery's comoponents.

nodes.label: compositionOfBattery
nodes.description: Full composition of battery is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: criticalRawMaterials
nodes.description: List of critical raw materials (CRM) as specified by EU in a battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: temperatureRangeIdleStateLowerLimit
nodes.preferredName: temperature range idle state lower limit
nodes.description: The lower range of temperature the battery can withstand when not in use is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: temperatureRangeIdleStateUpperLimit
nodes.description: The upper range of temperature the battery can withstand when not in use is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: cycleLifeTestCRate
nodes.description: C-rate of Relevant Cycle-life Test is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: cycleLifeTestDepthOfDischarge
nodes.description: Depth of discharge in the cycle-life test is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: expectedLifetime
nodes.description: Expected battery lifetime expressed in cycles, and reference test used is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: fileLocation
nodes.description: Location of the file

nodes.label: title
nodes.description: Title of the attached file

nodes.label: maximumAllowedBatteryPower
nodes.description: Maximum allowed battery power (W) of the battery is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: powerFade
nodes.description: Maximum allowed battery power (W) of the battery is describing a business requirement.

nodes.label: powerCapabilityAt20Charge
nodes.description: Power (capability) at 20% state of charge. Description from the regulation is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: powerCapabilityAt80Charge
nodes.description: Power (capability) at 80% state of charge. Description from the regulation is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: originalPowerCapability
nodes.description: Performance ability of the high voltage battery i.e. the amount of energy that a battery is capable to provide over a given period of time is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: originalPowerCapabilityLimits
nodes.description: Performance ability of the high voltage battery according to limits i.e. how much power it can provide within given limits is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: minVoltage
nodes.description: Value of the minimal voltage the battery is rated for is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: nominalVoltage
nodes.description: Value of the nominal voltage the battery is rated for is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: maxVoltage
nodes.description: Value of the maximum voltage the battery is rated for is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: cellInternalResistance
nodes.description: The resistance offered by the cell in the flow of the current

nodes.label: packInternalResistance
nodes.description: Total internal resistance in a battery pack is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: packInternalResistanceIncrease
nodes.description: Increase in internal resistance of a battery pack over a period of time is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: maximumAllowedBatteryEnergy
nodes.description: Maximum allowed battery energy (Wh) of the battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: energyRoundtripEfficiency
nodes.description: Round-trip efficiency is the percentage of electricity put into storage is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: energyRoundtripEfficiencyChange
nodes.description: Round-trip efficiency is the percentage of electricity put into storage is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: materialPercentageMassFraction
nodes.description: Percentage mass fraction of a material.

nodes.label: materialWeight
nodes.description: Weight of the material (in gram)

nodes.label: materialName
nodes.description: Name of the material

nodes.label: componentsSupplier
nodes.description:
Contact details of the suppliers of replacement parts / spare parts is describing a regulatory requirement. Available fields should be like:
Name - Street - Number - ZIP Code - City - State - Country - Phone - Fax - Email - Website

nodes.label: componentsPartNumber
nodes.description: The unique serial numbers of the different parts of a battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

nodes.label: componentsSupplierName
nodes.description: Name of the components supplier
